data.revised_prompt: Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet, exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background #FF00FF only. Subject: Huo Ying fire lotus pet for Samsara Ascension — small floating cute fire-lotus spirit, orange-golden petals, tiny ember core face, soft flame leaf shapes, friendly magical companion. Clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, readable at 32 to 64 pixel scale, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Full body visible in every frame, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 50 to 58 percent of each cell with generous magenta margin. Combat animation with real pose changes: top-left frame attack wind-up / casting wind-up, body crouches or coils, focus pulls close; top-right frame compact strike / shot release / magic pulse, body lunges or snaps forward while effects stay tight; bottom-left frame follow-through with clear recoil and flame momentum, no wide detached effect; bottom-right frame guard or recovery pose, ready to loop back into combat. Preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/core face, costume/armor marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change. Entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud. No text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, borders, visible grid lines, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, photorealism, 3D render, or pixel art.
